overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a white-haired character exploring a gothic castle at night. The character ascends grand staircases and walks along battlements illuminated by torchlight, with a starry sky and meteors visible above. The environment features ornate stone architecture, burning braziers, and dramatic views of a dark void below.

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone staircase holding a torch, flanked by stone walls and statues

entered.detail: tall stone tower with arched windows and spires illuminated from within
wide worn stone steps ascending between stone walls
tall classical stone statue on pedestal beside the stairs
iron wall-mounted torches providing warm orange light
ornate stone balustrade lining the staircase edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase flanked by walls and statues, approaching a massive gothic tower. Wall sconces cast warm light on the worn stone steps as the camera follows from behind.

events.description: exits enclosed staircase into open courtyard plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the open courtyard between castle buildings, approaching a central structure before turning left

entered.detail: open stone-paved area surrounded by castle walls and buildings
multi-story stone structures with arched windows and doorways
large ornate stone structure or fountain in the courtyard center
standing fire pit with flames illuminating the plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase into an open courtyard, the character crosses the stone plaza past burning braziers. The gothic tower recedes to the left as the character approaches a central monument and turns toward a terrace exit.

events.description: turns left and begins descending curved terrace walkway

agents.ego_description: walking down the curved terrace alongside stone columns with open views of the night sky to the left

entered.detail: tall ornate stone pillars supporting arches along the terrace
decorative stone balustrade overlooking the dark void
dark starry sky visible through the colonnade arches

segments.scene_description: The character descends a curved terrace lined with gothic columns on the right and open railings on the left. The night sky becomes visible through the arches as the character moves along the colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open battlements with panoramic night view

events.description: meteor shower becomes visible in the night sky
stops at stone railing to look out over the edge at the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the battlements then stopping to gaze at the meteor shower and distant landscape beyond the railing

entered.detail: large burning brazier on iron stand casting bright light
dark silhouettes of distant towers visible in the void
streaks of light falling through the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along open battlements, the character approaches a burning brazier and stops to observe a meteor shower in the night sky. The view opens to reveal distant spires silhouetted against the stars beyond the stone railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed corridors of a gothic interior to the vast, open expanse of a starry night sky. It begins by following the character up a grand stone staircase flanked by statues and warm wall sconces, moving steadily toward a massive tower. As the character emerges from the stairs, the scene opens into a wide stone courtyard where the camera glides past burning braziers and a central monument toward a terrace exit. The perspective then shifts as the character descends a curved colonnade, with the architecture opening up to reveal the dark sky through a series of gothic arches. Finally, the camera moves along the open battlements to a burning brazier, where the view expands fully to reveal distant spires silhouetted against a meteor shower.
